mapper.sql: id, appeal_id, action_type, action_user_id, action_user_name, action_time, before_status, after_status, before_score, after_score, comment, ip_address, user_agent, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM appeal_audit_logs WHERE appeal_id = #{appealId} ORDER BY action_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO appeal_audit_logs (appeal_id, action_type, action_user_id, action_user_name, action_time, before_status, after_status, before_score, after_score, comment, ip_address, user_agent, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.appealId}, #{item.actionType}, #{item.actionUserId}, #{item.actionUserName}, #{item.actionTime}, #{item.beforeStatus}, #{item.afterStatus}, #{item.beforeScore}, #{item.afterScore}, #{item.comment}, #{item.ipAddress}, #{item.userAgent}, NOW())
